name: sepolia_block_149_889_087
description: Sepolia tx 0x4f940a5b... at block 149,889,087 (idx 1). EIP-7702 SetCode tx (type 0x04) at ArbOS v40. Locks the spec_id_by_arbos_version mapping for v40-49 → SpecId::PRAGUE; pre-fix arbreth maps v40 → CANCUN, causing revm to reject type 0x04 with Eip7702NotSupported and drop the tx from the block.
